theme_and_archetype.archetype: Archetype 7 (Electric & Neon) merged with Archetype 5 (Jewel & Luxury)
theme_and_archetype.reasoning: The application requires a dark, moody concert atmosphere with high-contrast, premium glowing neon accents simulating real LED lightsticks. It avoids cheap sci-fi tropes, focusing on an elegant, physical-feeling interface.

typography.strategy: The 'Editorial Future' pairing. A wide display sans for headings and a clean geometric sans for the body.

headings.usage: Use 'font-bold' for screen titles, 'font-light' for numeric readouts (like signal strength or brightness %). Always tight tracking for massive headings.

body.usage: Used for all functional UI text, labels, and secondary information.

bento_grid.usage: Use for the Home/Color Control screen to organize Brightness, Modes, and Battery info around the central Hero Lightstick.

buttons.primary: bg-white text-black rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-bold hover:scale-105 transition-transform duration-300 active:scale-95
buttons.neon: bg-transparent text-white border border-white/20 rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-bold hover:bg-white/10 hover:border-[#A6C1EE] hover:shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(166,193,238,0.5)] transition-all duration-300
buttons.icon_action: h-14 w-14 rounded-full bg-white/5 border border-white/10 flex items-center justify-center hover:bg-white/15 backdrop-blur-xl

lightstick_visualizer.description: A stylized 2D/3D-looking cylinder and top dome using Tailwind gradients. The glow color dynamically changes based on the selected color state.
lightstick_visualizer.structure: A vertical flex container. Top: A hexagon or diamond shape with dynamic drop-shadow glow and radial gradient. Bottom: A sleek dark gray cylinder with inner shadows to look metallic. Use framer-motion for pulsing effects.

bottom_sheet.classes: fixed inset-x-0 bottom-0 z-50 bg-[#0A0A0A]/90 backdrop-blur-3xl border-t border-white/10 rounded-t-[40px] p-6 pb-12 shadow-[0_-10px_40px_rgba(0,0,0,0.8)]

connection_scan.layout: Centered layout with pulsing radar animation.
elements: Pulsing circular SVG rings in the center.
List of found devices styled as sleek glassmorphic rows with 'Connect' buttons and signal strength bars.
Background: concert_bg image with heavy black gradient overlay (bg-black/80).

home_control.layout: Mobile app style. Header with battery status. Central massive lightstick visualizer. Bottom controls.
elements: Header: Connection status badge (green dot), Battery icon.
Hero: The lightstick visualizer taking up 50% of the screen height, glowing in the current color.
Quick Action Row: 4 circular buttons (Power, Modes, Concert, Members).
Brightness Control: Wide slider floating above the bottom navigation area.
Cards: Solid, Blink, Pulse, Strobe, Wave. Each card has a distinct micro-animation (e.g., a small dot pulsing inside the card).
Active card has a glowing border (`border-[#A6C1EE] shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(166,193,238,0.3)]`).

concert_mode.layout: Immersive dark screen prioritizing beat-sync visuals.
elements: Background uses concert_bg_alt with dark overlay.
Audio visualizer bars (animated divs) jumping to a simulated beat.
Slide-to-disconnect physical-feeling toggle at the bottom.

member_presets_sheet.layout: Bottom sheet sliding up over the current view.
elements: Grid of 9 circular glowing orbs, each with the member's specific color.
Label under each orb with the member's name.
Clicking an orb instantly changes the central lightstick visualizer color.

animations_and_motion.pulse: Use framer-motion `animate={{ scale: [1, 1.05, 1], opacity: [0.8, 1, 0.8] }}` for active lights.
animations_and_motion.page_transition: Slide up and fade in for new screens (`initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }}`).
animations_and_motion.haptic_feedback: Visually simulate haptics by scaling buttons down slightly on click (`active:scale-95`).

images.description: Dark atmospheric concert crowd with blue glowing lights. Use with heavy black opacity overlay for app backgrounds.
Person holding a light in the dark. Perfect for the Concert Mode immersive background.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build this as a React (web) application optimized for mobile viewports (simulate mobile app UI using a max-width container, e.g., max-w-md mx-auto, 100vh height, hidden scrollbars).
Do NOT use HTML `<input type='color'>`. Build a custom color picker or use member preset buttons.

Implement the 'Lightstick Visualizer' heavily using Tailwind CSS. Create a `div` representing the handle (metallic dark gray gradient) and a `div` for the top gem (white base with dynamic `drop-shadow` and `box-shadow` matching the selected color state).
Use Framer Motion heavily for the pulse effects, bottom-sheet slide-ups, and the radar scanning rings.
Mock the BLE connection flow. Show a scanning state for 2 seconds, find a mock device 'EXO Fanlight Ver. 3', and transition to the control screen on connect.
